summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording of the legendary Alfred College show featuring a smoking New Speedway Boogie and standout Cold Jordan.
review: The SBD capture is praised for its crisp, clear mix that lets listeners hear every acoustic guitar swap and Jerry’s blistering lead on New Speedway Boogie. The performance itself is celebrated as one of the great early‑70 shows – tight acoustic sets, a fiery electric transition, and highlights like Cold Jordan, The Other One and Pigpen make it a must‑listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Over thirty reviews overwhelmingly rate the show 4–5 stars, cite excellent sound quality and multiple standout songs; only minor technical comments appear, yielding a strong positive overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Consistently described as crisp, clear and ‘best live sound ever’; a few reviewers note the occasional minor drop‑out or that it could be slightly better, but overall the mix is very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic duo opening (Race Is On, Wake Up Little Susie) transitions smoothly into electric set; Jerry and Bob trade licks on New Speedway Boogie, with David Nelson adding a second acoustic before moving to mandolin on Cold Jordan.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for fiery lead work and trading licks on New Speedway Boogie; excellent guitar tone throughout.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted playing acoustic rhythm alongside Jerry in the early set.
